title: olfersia simplex
intro: Olfersia simplex, also known as the Himalayan mint or Nepalese mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Olfersia simplex include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve headaches, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as essential oils and tinctures.
